title: microstachys daphnoides var. oleoides
intro: Microstachys daphnoides var. oleoides, also known as the Olingan or Olinga tree, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microstachys daphnoides var. oleoides include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are typically used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
